_doc: Permanent regression dataset v1 for MedRack (Phase 4, directive v1.0). 20 representative MBBS questions spanning PSM and FMT, long and short, easy/moderate/difficult. NEVER MODIFY — this dataset is the permanent benchmark suite. To extend, add a v2.json with additional questions. The benchmark framework (Phase 5) loads this file to measure before/after metrics for every architectural change. To add a question: copy an existing entry shape, fill in the fields, save. The (module, qid) tuple is the unique key — modules use independent qid sequences (q001, q002, ...), so module + qid is the disambiguator.

questions.subject: psm
questions.notes: Short factual question; tests the LLM's ability to answer concisely with the right Indian data point (IMR).

questions.subject: psm
questions.notes: Tests the LLM's ability to define surveillance with Indian context (IDSP).

questions.subject: psm
questions.notes: Justify + examples; tests the LLM's ability to provide structured 10-mark answer with examples.

questions.subject: psm
questions.notes: PQLI; tests the LLM's ability to handle composite health indices.

questions.subject: psm
questions.notes: Multifactorial causation with examples; tests depth of epidemiological reasoning.

questions.subject: psm
questions.notes: Natural history of disease (Park's framework); tests the LLM's command of the core PSM framework.

questions.subject: psm
questions.notes: Natural history + levels of prevention + modes of intervention; long 10-mark answer.

questions.subject: psm
questions.notes: Criteria for causality (Henle-Koch, Evans, Rothman); tests the LLM's ability to enumerate criteria concisely.

questions.subject: psm
questions.notes: Disease control vs eradication; tests the LLM's ability to distinguish definitions.

questions.subject: psm
questions.notes: Vitamin A sources + deficiency signs; tests the LLM's ability to provide a structured 5-mark answer with clinical data.

questions.subject: psm
questions.notes: Lathyrism; tests the LLM's ability to cover a less common but exam-relevant topic.

questions.subject: psm
questions.notes: Mid-day meal scheme; tests the LLM's command of Indian national programmes.

questions.subject: fmt
questions.notes: Perjury; tests the LLM's command of IPC sections + court procedure.

questions.subject: fmt
questions.notes: Methods to mutilate fingerprints; tests the LLM's ability to cover forensic identification.

questions.subject: fmt
questions.notes: Negative autopsy; tests the LLM's ability to handle edge-case forensic pathology.

questions.subject: fmt
questions.notes: Obscure autopsy; tests the LLM's command of autopsy classification.

questions.subject: fmt
questions.notes: Entry wound characteristics of rifled firearms at varying ranges; tests depth of forensic ballistics.

questions.subject: fmt
questions.notes: Incised vs lacerated wounds; tests the LLM's ability to distinguish wound types concisely.

questions.subject: fmt
questions.notes: DNA fingerprinting; tests the LLM's command of modern forensic techniques.

questions.subject: fmt
questions.notes: PM appearance after inorganic acid ingestion; tests forensic toxicology reasoning.
